title: AFM Nanofiber Analyzer
description: A GUI and command-line toolkit for analyzing nanofiber morphology from Atomic Force Microscopy (AFM) height images. It reads text/CSV exports and native Gwyddion .gwy files, then performs background calibration, binarization, skeletonization, kink and endpoint/branch-point detection, height profiling, and per-fiber statistical analysis. Results are stored in validated, versioned bundle files, and the application can be packaged as a standalone Windows bundle.
